name: @ryu/webhooks-app
description: The Ryu Webhooks app: the inbound webhook endpoint registry (resolved public URLs, secret presence, last-delivery + the ingress backend banner) shipped as a full-page Companion (Path B, ui_format:"html"). Read-only view over Core's /api/webhooks + /api/webhook-ingress/status through the webhooks:crud bridge capability; built to one self-contained HTML via vite-plugin-singlefile. Consumes @ryu/ui components (tree-shaken into the single-file bundle).
